---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TaskForge
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools that illustrate the feature.
